long_description:
[Acadia-SRE]-Network Interface is missing on the node in zonal cluster [DAL] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL:                    https://github.ibm.com/storage-sre-and-operations/SOP/blob/main/platform/alerts/troubleshooting_acadia_than_os_alerts.md#12-node-network-interface-is-missing
TIP Situation:                      Observed service-error-node_network_interface_missing_zonal issue in Osprey-Acadia-OS
TIP Short Description:              Acadia node network interface missing for zonal cluster
TIP Console:                        toc
TIP Self Healing:                   false
TIP Self Healing Timeout Seconds:   3600
TIP CRN:                            crn:v1:bluemix:public:storage-platform-acadia:us-south::mzonep22:microservice: 

Event Generated:

Severity:            sev-3
Metric:
    sum by (host_hostname, agent_tag_cluster)(min_over_time(node_network_info{agent_tag_cluster_type="acadia", agent_tag_cluster=~"mzonep.*", agent_tag_cluster!~"mzoneb51|mzonep23|mzonep62|mzonep71|mzonep72|mzoneph1|mzonepi1|mzonepj1|mzonept1|mzonepu1|mzonepv1|mzones21|mzones41|mzonep81|mzonep91|mzonepa1|mzonep51|mzonep61|mzonep71|mzonep72|mzonepk1|mzonepl1|mzonepm1"}[15m])) < 20 = 14.00

State:               Triggered
